steps.title: Identify the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: Sentence 2 establishes the rule: a plurality wins, not a majority. The new sentence explains the consequence—if several candidates compete, one can win without a majority. The signal is the cause-and-effect relationship: sentence 3 follows from sentence 2.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: ”Accordingly” expresses “as a result” or “as a logical consequence”—the exact relationship between sentence 2's rule and sentence 3's consequence. The other three don't signal a cause-and-effect flow. That matches choice C — C is correct.
